title: Believer
why_this_song: High-energy chorus repeats 'pain / you made me a believer' — great for teaching past simple of irregular verbs and present perfect of 'make'.
grammar_callouts: You made me a believer — past simple + object + complement

lines: You made me a, you made me a believer, believer
I'ma say all the words inside my head
I'm fired up and tired of the way that things have been, oh-ooh
The way that things have been, oh-ooh

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "pain" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "pain" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "believer" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "believer" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Singing from heartache from the pain
Living my brain up in the cloud

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'ma say all the words inside my head
Hoping my feelings, they would drown

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Believer" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Believer" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Believer" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Believer", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Believer" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Believer" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** The percussive rhythm helps students internalize stress on 'PAIN' and 'BE-liever' — useful for prosody practice. Watch the volume at the chorus; some learners find it overwhelming.
